calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award - Ccp 1285
Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Lauren Jones; Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP; 415-926-7600; appearing via Zoom on behalf of petitioner Cheers Development, LLC.

No other appearances.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CHEERS DEVELOPMENT, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Order and judgment signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award - Ccp 1285
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Continued To Sep-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER CHEERS DEVELOPMENT, LLC's Verified Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award - CCP 1285.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on 9/28/2021. That department handles all cases related to the acquisition of real property per San Francisco local rule 8.10A1. The moving party shall provide courtesy copies to Department 501 by 9/22.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
